query:
UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 16 
WHERE categoryId != 16 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%burger%' OR name LIKE '%Burger%' OR name LIKE '%BURGER%' 
    OR name LIKE '%hambur%' OR name LIKE '%Hambur%' OR name LIKE '%HAMBUR%'
    OR name LIKE '%smash%' OR name LIKE '%Smash%' OR name LIKE '%SMASH%');
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway06.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 4LUtXE4vPqQU3CD.root --database WG3U3sVg2ZrW6m8T99FRdE --execute UPDATE establishments 
SET categoryId = 16 
WHERE categoryId != 16 
  AND source = 'spreadsheet'
  AND (name LIKE '%burger%' OR name LIKE '%Burger%' OR name LIKE '%BURGER%' 
    OR name LIKE '%hambur%' OR name LIKE '%Hambur%' OR name LIKE '%HAMBUR%'
    OR name LIKE '%smash%' OR name LIKE '%Smash%' OR name LIKE '%SMASH%');
